claim.summary: The delegated queue now has a product-native enqueue-manifest intake command. In an isolated live-vLLM run, that command ingested the default external breadth manifest, embedded portable task payloads into queued jobs, drained all 10 jobs successfully, and closed through queue.role_closeout as queue_empty_trusted.

focused_tests.command: /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m py_compile scripts/run_job_queue.py tests/test_job_queue.py && /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_job_queue.py && /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python -m py_compile /tmp/agentkernel_a5_live_vllm_enqueue_manifest_role_r19_20260425/run_enqueue_manifest_role.py && /home/peyton/miniconda3/envs/ai/bin/python /tmp/agentkernel_a5_live_vllm_enqueue_manifest_role_r19_20260425/run_enqueue_manifest_role.py
focused_tests.result: passed: full job queue suite, 74 passed in 21.64s; enqueue_manifest_role_jobs=10 all_completed=true elapsed_seconds=25.78 role_closeout=queue_empty_trusted

code_changes: scripts/run_job_queue.py adds enqueue-manifest, a batch workstream intake command that loads external manifests through TaskBank, filters by task/family/limit, enqueues via DelegatedJobQueue, and supports JSON output.
enqueue-manifest embeds each resolved external task as runtime_overrides.task_payload so later drains do not depend on the manifest path remaining configured.
tests/test_job_queue.py covers JSON enqueue-manifest output, family budget inference, priority assignment, and embedded external task payload metadata.

isolated_cli_r19.preflight_mode: drain --enforce-preflight 0 because host bubblewrap preflight is unavailable in this environment

open_limits: This packet proves product-native manifest intake plus native closeout, but it is intentionally short and does not replace r18's longer continuity evidence.
The manifest is the repo's default external breadth manifest, not a live product/user issue stream.
The host environment lacks working bubblewrap preflight, so this packet uses the same explicit --enforce-preflight 0 live-drain path as r10 through r18.
A stronger full A5 claim still needs multi-hour continuity with product/user workstream intake.
